dataList.dlg: Новый мужчина написал... Давно у меня не было настоящей ночи. Я думаю, Филлип не обидется в этот раз. Тем более, мне так этого уже не хватает

Warm tea in the early morning is, from a medical perspective, recommended for the regulation of circadian rhythm и the stimulation of gastrointestinal tract reflexes.... *cough* However, may I recommend broadening your options to other forms of beverages, Herr Gregor?
... Если you are opposed to the idea, then please consider giving the room some much-needed ventilation, при the very least.

A surprise explosion of such nature in the very center of downtown при high noon... This incident hardly seems to reflect the ordinary reality of urban violence. Balloons, swollen far past their elastic tension would allow, popped synchronically и without warning—except, they were actually people swelling up и scattering thousands of needles in every direction. Если the phenomenon is to be put в words... perhaps that would be the closest approximation.

You haven't clocked out yet, Herr Gregor? <color=#a1591e>Not yet... You staying to Пройдиsome backlog, too?</color> No. Though Faust has concluded все assigned tasks, she will not be calling it a day just yet—please feel free to share any remaining workload with Faust. <color=#a1591e>Thanks, really... But what's got you sticking around this late когда you don't have to?</color> There is something... I would personally like to investigate. <color=#a1591e>Lemme guess... Brainstem Focus Resonator, is it? You're trying to trace where it came from.</color> ... Correct.

It strains the realm of believability... But this observation leads one to conjecture that "magic"—или what could crudely be described as such, при least—does exist... No, Faust would rather dignify the hypothesis that it involves something of Outskirts origin that has not yet been cataloged на Faust... for lack of a better explanation. Perhaps this matter calls Faust to confer with the other Fausts.

While it is undeniably problematic that embedded needles can dissolve the structural body of buildings... More hazardous would be the chain reaction they cause: civilians и passersby explode simply на being struck на those needles.

Entrusting this sort of rote drudgery to Faust is no less than a tremendous waste of her operational capacity. Sinclair, you certainly possess a remarkable ability in brewing ssanghwa-cha, but I trust that you did not register as a Fixer to be this Office's resident Grade 5 Tea-brewer. Please получает over this task вместо этого.
<color=#a1591e>You sure you're not just shirking your duties и offloading your work on him?</color>
... Please stop with the absurd jokes, Herr Gregor. It не contribute in any shape или form to Sinclair's progress as a Fixer.

Yesterday's Promise... Faust knows that you are the mastermind behind not only the Thousand Needles, but also the series of incidents that have occurred throughout the City of late.
Все that's left is to gather a threadable clue on the rumored "contract" of which you are the point of origin...

Если Faust is to arrive при the truth she seeks... Settling this Office's monthly rent should be the priority.
With our Office located in a Nest, the rent payable is astronomical... But Herr Gregor said that resolving this contract on the "Library" will keep us afloat for при least 3 months. Let us наносит with these Librarians first и slowly pace the investigation в the true nature of the demon.
There is sufficient time to spare. I will finalize our expense calculations in the meantime. Sinclair? Milk tea for me, please.
Давай поставим все точки над И. Филлип, он просто оказался лучше тебя. Прости.
Has this request been assigned exclusively to our Office?
Faust shall launch a preemptive strike before the opponents begin their offensive.
Я тебе нужна? Прости, мой рот уже занят чужим членом на эту сессию.
От рассвета до заката, я ебала даже брата.
Тебе далеко до него.
Ах.. опять против моей воли...
Ты ведь тоже этого хотел, да?
Вся вина лежит на мне... Нет.. на маленьком члене Филлипа...
Как и следовало ожидать, что наш Офис посадил даже этих кукичей на короткую привязь.
В этот раз могу признать, что в теории, гипотетичекси, наверное, виновата всё же я.
Филлип? Он мне всегда нравился. Он милый мальчик, красивый и добрый, но ему не хватает смелости, чтобы я была счастлива. Я блядина? Ну да
Хорошо, что всё по итогу обошлось. Сальвадор сильно был рад, когда я наконец-то призналась ему. Да и я тоже рада. НАВЕРНОЕ никто из наших себя ПЛОХО не чувствует
Видимо, наш тройничок придётся прикрыть... Простите Сальвадор и Филлип, но придётся вам пока постоять в очереди
